name: claude-seo
description: Comprehensive SEO plugin for Claude Code with 25 sub-skills and 18 sub-agents. Covers technical SEO, content quality (E-E-A-T), schema markup, image optimization, sitemap architecture, AI search optimization (GEO), local SEO, maps intelligence, semantic clustering, search experience optimization (SXO), SEO drift monitoring, e-commerce SEO, international SEO, FLOW framework, Google API integration, PDF reporting, and strategic planning.
